title: Mutation Toast Feedback Golden Path v1
problem: The repo now has the correct default explicit submit owner (`fret-mutation` + `fret`), but first-contact users still do not have one small copyable example that combines authoritative mutation state with recipe-owned Sonner feedback. Without that teaching surface, users can still treat toast helpers as submit owners or fall back to raw executor/inbox plumbing for ordinary app flows.

repro.summary: Open the new cookbook example first, then run the dedicated screenshot smoke so the repo keeps one copyable submit-plus-feedback proof instead of two disjoint partial examples.
commands: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- dev native --example mutation_toast_feedback_basics

FRET_DIAG=1 cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/cookbook/mutation-toast-feedback-basics/cookbook-mutation-toast-feedback-basics-smoke.json --dir target/fret-diag/mutation-toast-feedback-basics --session-auto --launch -- cargo run -p fret-cookbook --features cookbook-mutation,cookbook-diag --example mutation_toast_feedback_basics

gates.name: cookbook-diag-smoke
gates.command: FRET_DIAG=1 cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/cookbook/mutation-toast-feedback-basics/cookbook-mutation-toast-feedback-basics-smoke.json --dir target/fret-diag/mutation-toast-feedback-basics --session-auto --launch -- cargo run -p fret-cookbook --features cookbook-mutation,cookbook-diag --example mutation_toast_feedback_basics

continue_policy.notes: This lane is closed. Reuse it as the latest verdict for the copyable mutation-authority plus Sonner-feedback teaching path only. If future work shifts to broader query invalidation teaching, GenUI bridges, or Sonner API redesign, start a different narrow follow-on instead of reopening this lane.
